reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass threshold by comparing performance and cost at the same operational level and by grounding procurement advice in trade-study discipline.
strengths: The article is especially strong on separating acquisition cost from full lifecycle and integration cost.
It gives readers concrete measures-of-effectiveness and worksheet-style approaches that improve decision value.
The piece avoids vague budget talk and keeps cost-performance balance tied to mission consequence.
summary_assessment: This article passes comfortably. It is one of the stronger planning pieces in the set because it turns an abstract budget debate into a disciplined systems-engineering process.
